calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Ng, via Zoom, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

The court notes that on Jul-26-2022, an Order to Show Cause Regarding Terminating Estate for Lack Of Assets Subject to Administration On Court's Own Motion was issued and served on all parties entitled to service. No one appeared other than the Personal Representative. The court terminates the Estate for Lack of Assets on its own motion.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Ng, via Zoom, in propria persona, Administrator.

Mr. Ng reports that he has not yet hired an attorney. The court conveys to Mr. Ng that in an effort to save him resources, the court can close this estate without an additional petition. The court confirms with Mr. Ng that he is amenable to the courts advice and confirms that he did not marshal any assets belonging to the decedent and that he is not aware of any unclaimed assets. The court advises Mr. Ng that it will be preparing an order to formally close this estate and that he will be provided a copy of order via U.S. mail.

The Status on Close of Estate is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Ng, in person, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

The court confirms with Mr. Ng that he is still searching for assistance to help him close the estate and that he has not taken possession of any assets belonging to the decedent and that he is not aware of any unclaimed assets. The Court summarizes what Mr. Ng needs to do to close this estate but advises him that the court may be able to do so without him filing a petition. Mr. Ng advises that he'd prefer to continue to search for an attorney to assist him with this matter and asks for a continuance, accordingly.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Continued To Jun-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Ng, in person, Personal Representative.

The court confirms with Mr. Ng that he is aware of this attorney's death. Mr. Ng reports that due to current financial status, he is not in the position to hire a new attorney. The court advises Mr. Ng of the probate rules regarding attorney compensation.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-20-2022 at 9:00 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Continued To Apr-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Timothy Ng Chung to appear on Apr-11-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Mar-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Transfer Of Property Belonging To Linda Ng As Community Property (Probate Code 850a(2)(D))
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via ZOOM, for Linda Ng, Petitioner.

The court notes that this matter had been on calendar approximately one month ago and was continued to today for the purpose of providing notice to the creditor. The court acknowledges that service has been provided and that no appearance has been made to object to the petition.

The Petition for Transfer of Property, etc., is submitted. The court advises Ms. Harrington that it does not have a proposed order and instructs her to email it to the assigned Examiner and to copy Sandy Hilton in the message.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

Petition For Transfer Of Property Belonging To Linda Ng As Community Property (Probate Code 850a(2)(D))
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Continued To Jan-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington, Esq., counsel for Linda Ng, Petitioner (appearing by video conference)

The Court notes at the outset that a creditor's claim has been filed in this matter and queries counsel as to whether the creditor has received notice of the pending petition. Ms. Harrington confirms that notice was not sent to the creditor. Given the impact of the pending petition on the ability of the estate to pay the claim if approved, the Court submits that notice should be given to the creditor. Ms. Harrington notes that the pending petition contends the assets referenced in the petition would not be assets of the estate in any event but would not be opposed to providing notice.

The Court notes that Probate Code Secs. 850 and 855 were well addressed in Petitioner's pleadings but will continue the matter for notice to the creditor.

The Court continues the matter to January 24, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Dillingham. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via ZOOM, for Linda Ng, Petitioner.

The court advises Ms. Harrington that it is not convinced that an 850 petition is the correct vehicle for this case and advises that it is willing to consider any supporting points and authorities. Ms. Harrington provides oral testimony in support of her position. The court then instructs Ms. Harrington to file a legal brief to support her petition.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Transfer of Property, etc., is continued to Dec-06-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
